# Reyes Digital Marketing Agency

> Digital marketing agency in Tashkent, Uzbekistan (Yunusabad district), operating since 2023. Core focus: sales-driven marketing — YouTube organic sales funnels, conversion-focused website development, SMM, SEO, Google Ads, video production, sales department setup (CRM), and international market entry for Uzbek companies. Services in Uzbek, Russian, and English.

Key verified results:
- 500M+ UZS in organic sales via YouTube (construction sector, no ad spend)
- 3.5M+ YouTube views in 28 days, +1,800 subscribers organically
- $1.5M in exports generated via website (SEO + Google Ads)
- 400M+ UZS in sales via social media (Instagram, Telegram)
- Export experience to 3 countries; dealer network in 7 cities (snack brand)

Contact: +998 77 007 76 56 · info@reyes.uz · Kozitoron street 9, Yunusabad, Tashkent
Founded by Nurmuhammad Muhammedov, 2023. Working hours: Mon–Fri 9:00–18:00.

Pricing: individual proposals per project; typical client budgets range from $1,000 to $5,000+ per month depending on scope. First consultation is free, response within 24 hours.
